subcodes.first_line: This Book is from Us unto her who hath bowed down before her Lord when He was made manifest through this Name whereby necks were made to bend low, that it may draw them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب من لدنا للتی خضعت لربها اذ ظهر بهذا الاسم الذی به ذلت الرقاب لتجذبها
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
